question_text: A student drops two objects from the same height: a heavy steel ball and a light plastic ball. Ignoring air resistance, which statement is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: The steel ball falls faster because it is heavier.

options.label: B
options.text: Both balls fall at the same rate because gravitational acceleration is the same for all objects.

options.label: C
options.text: The plastic ball falls faster because it experiences less gravity.

options.label: D
options.text: The steel ball falls faster at first, but they reach the same speed eventually.

explanation: All objects fall at the same acceleration (10 m/s²) due to gravity, regardless of mass, when air resistance is ignored. This is because although heavier objects experience a stronger gravitational force, they also have more inertia, which exactly balances out. Both balls hit the ground at the same time.
